stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
The appendix shows a navigation display (ND) where the Required Navigation Performance (RNP) and Actual Navigation Performance (ANP) values are shown. Which of the following statements is a correct interpretation of these displayed values.

options.a: The navigation system is performing to an accuracy of 2.00 NM and the aeroplane is within 0.05 NM of the desired track.
options.b: During the cruise phase, there shall be NO warning if the EPE value is 0.05 higher than the RNP value as RNP 2 applies to the approach phase.
options.c: The aircraft is currently performing according to the RNP, but a warning will be given if the EPE increases beyond 2.00.
